## Signal Submission Checklist

<!-- Thanks for contributing to Flipper Signal DB! Please fill in the details below. -->

### Signal details
- **Name:** 
- **Frequency:** 
- **Protocol:** 
- **Category:** `garage_doors` / `car_keys` / `intercoms` / `weather_stations` / `custom`

### Checklist

- [ ] `.sub` file added to `signals/` folder
- [ ] Entry added to `signals.json` with all required fields
- [ ] `filename` in `signals.json` matches the actual file name exactly
- [ ] Signal was captured on a device I own or have explicit permission to capture
- [ ] No rolling-code signals that could compromise real security systems
- [ ] No personally identifiable information in the signal file
- [ ] Description clearly explains what the signal does and what device it came from

### Notes / Context
<!-- Anything else reviewers should know? Model of device, capture conditions, etc. -->
